name: Mindra
tagline: Agent Teams You Can Actually Delegate To
description: Mindra is the command center for your non-sleeping, 24/7 awake agentic team. Explain your task, and Mindra will create the best agentic team for you. Automate your marketing, supply chain and more. With Mindra's built-in governance, human oversight, and support for your existing stack, you can finally trust your agents.

name: Aaavatar
tagline: Branded team headshots in one drop
description: Drop one or more profile photos into Aaavatar. Backgrounds is removed, colors balanced, missing pieces restored in one click, everyone aligned, and exported in every format you need. Built for HR and design teams maintaining a branded team gallery.

name: Codex Pets
tagline: Animated companions for your Codex workflow
description: Codex Pets are optional animated companions for Codex. They live in a floating overlay, show active thread status, reflect whether Codex is running, waiting, or ready for review, and can be customized through the hatch-pet skill.

name: Flowly
tagline: Your personal AI assistant, native to your desktop
description: Flowly is a native AI assistant that takes action across your apps and browser tabs. Summon it as a full chat, from the menubar, or through a notch overlay — one global hotkey away on macOS, Windows, and Linux. Since our January launch we shipped a browser agent, voice coach, and end-to-end encryption — your chats stay yours, even from us. Free forever — Pro plan for unlimited usage.

name: Claude Code & Codex Usage Trading Cards by Rudel
tagline: Get your trading card based on your CC & codex usage
description: Rudel now turns your Claude Code & Codex sessions into a trading card with an archetype based on your pattern. Based on session shape, token usage, model mix, repo breadth, cost intensity, output signals, errors, and patterns. Free, open source, and self-hostable.

name: Dropy
tagline: Track prices on stores like Amazon, eBay, & AliExpress
description: Dropy helps you save money by tracking prices on thousands of online stores like Amazon, eBay, and AliExpress. Get instant notifications when prices drop, view historical price charts, and make smarter purchasing decisions. Stop overpaying and start saving with Dropy!

name: Visitor profiles and timeline by Croct
tagline: Uncover the story behind every click to optimize your site
description: Track events, leverage profile attributes, and seamlessly connect anonymous to identified data the moment a user logs in. Dive deeper into individual, chronological timelines to see the exact pages they browsed and actions they took. Spot live visitors in real-time, explore optimization insights, and easily segment audiences to fuel AB tests and build highly personalized website experiences that convert better.

name: Panels Store
tagline: Buy DRM-free comics and read them instantly in Panels
description: Panels Store is a DRM-free digital comics marketplace built by the team behind Panels, the iOS and Mac comic reader used by hundreds of thousands of readers. Readers can discover, buy, download, and read comics without platform lock-in. Creators and publishers keep 80%, stay non-exclusive, and get access to an audience already reading comics every day.

name: Regulus by Cumbuca
tagline: AI chatbot trained on Brazil's Central Bank regulations
description: Generic AI hallucinate on Brazilian financial regulation. Lawyers are expensive. The rules change constantly. Regulus is an AI chatbot trained exclusively on official Central Bank normatives — Open Finance and Pix regulations, technical docs, and message catalogs. Ask regulatory questions in natural language, get answers with references to original sources. Built by Cumbuca, a licensed Payment Institution in Brazil. Free to use

name: Sleek Analytics for iOS
tagline: Your website analytics in your pocket
description: Sleek Analytics is a privacy-first Google Analytics alternative for Modern Web. Real-time website analytics, cookieless tracking, and fast dashboards.

name: Manex
tagline: Preserve useful answers, corrections, and context as memory
description: Manex is a private AI memory for documents and team knowledge. Upload files, ask grounded questions, and preserve useful answers, corrections, and context as memory. It runs locally where supported, keeps data private by default, and lets teams create a shared brain without per-seat pricing.

name: Replyke V7
tagline: Pre-Modeled Infra & Client SDKs for User-Powered Products.
description: Replyke is the complete infrastructure layer for how users interact and create content in your app. Comments, reactions, spaces, feeds, notifications, chat, follows — every system your users need, already modeled, moderation-ready, and production-ready. Stop rebuilding the same user interaction systems. Install an SDK, wrap your app in a provider, and ship your first feature in under an hour. Multi-platform: React, React Native, Expo, and Node.js.

name: Mobilewright
tagline: Playwright for iOS and Android. Free and open source
description: Playwright for iOS and Android. One unified API to automate real devices, simulators, and emulators — deterministic, auto-waiting, zero-config. Built for developers and AI agents.

name: DANCING CATS App
tagline: Hover Here to See PH Kitty Dance 🙀 (Cat Pic to Dance Video)
description: Turn Your Kitty Pics into Dancing Kitty Clips 🙀😻 The Dancing Cats app uses AI to turn your kitty’s photo into a 10sec dance video! Simple and fur-tastic: 1️⃣ Snap a pic 2️⃣ Get a unique video in 10 styles: Salsa, Ballet, Robot & maybe a Moonwalk??? 3️⃣ Share it with your friends! ✅ Who knew your cat had so much cattitude? 🙀 That what AI was made for 🤣😻

name: Doomscroll Calculator (by Habit Doom)
tagline: How many years will your phone steal from you?
description: Enter your daily screen time and your age. See how many years of waking life you'll lose to your phone, plus 60 specific things you'll miss: books, languages, marathons, novels, date nights, travel days and more. Free, no signup.

name: Anime Tracker
tagline: Track anime, get smart recs, share with buddies.
description: Free anime tracker with smart recommendations that learn your taste, a buddy system to share picks with friends, monthly sequel alerts, series folders, and a Chrome extension. AniList import. No ads, no feature locks, ever.

name: SalaryDuel · Game
tagline: Two roles. Who earns more? Real US salary data.
description: A daily salary guessing game on real US data. Each day, 10 rounds. Two real roles. You pick who earns more. After every pick, the real numbers come up: median, p25 to p75 range, market signal, top 4 employers hiring. US roles, 7 cities, refreshed monthly. Two modes: Daily bout for streaks, Endless for higher/lower. Free, no signup, no email. Not a salary calculator. A calibration tool dressed as a game.

name: ChicChic: The Social Beauty Marketplace
tagline: See it. Want it? Book it. The easiest way to find a pro.
description: The app where beauty happens. Scroll real looks. Tap "Book Now" to get that exact style from that exact pro. For Salons: A full business suite with scheduling, client reviews, and client Q&A. Stop screenshotting, start booking directly what you see - all in one app!

name: Highlyt
tagline: You highlight. You forget. Highlyt connects the dots.
description: Color-code ideas by meaning. Link highlights across books and papers. Every reader knows the pain: thousands of highlights across PDFs and books, all orphaned, never connected. Highlyt makes every highlight a node and every connection a typed edge (supports, contradicts, expands, questions). The result: a knowledge graph of your actual thinking.

name: Who is ruling us?
tagline: Explore Indian MPs by wealth, criminal cases, and education
description: I built a map-first way to explore every sitting Member of Parliament in India using publicly available data. Instead of scattered PDFs and tables, you can see MPs across Lok Sabha and Rajya Sabha through their declared assets, criminal cases, education, and gender representation. Switch between map, charts, and table views, and dive into individual profiles. All data is from MyNeta (ADR) and Sansad records. Just structured to make it easier to explore.
